lines.speaker: Ghost
lines.text: Woooo wooo wooooo woooo.

lines.speaker: Ghost
lines.text: You there! Seek out the centurion at once. Inform him that the enemy leader has been identified and the Carnifex Maximus himself has been dispatched to bring back his head!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err... What?

lines.speaker: Ghost
lines.text: Did you not hear me? Do I need to spell it out for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you could that would be great.

lines.speaker: Ghost
lines.text: Goodness you are a fool! Their leader is named Yonrith Lovakengj. He has fled to the west with his closest allies, but much of his army still remains. Carnifex Maximus Vardorvis is in pursuit of him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah... I still have no idea what you're on about.

lines.speaker: Ghost
lines.text: Useless! Perhaps the headsman needs to take your head as well. I will find the centurion myself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay... Good luck with that.

lines.speaker: Ghost
lines.text: Ah, there you are. Dire news I'm afraid. We've lost all contact with the capital. Worse, another dwarven clan has joined the Saradominists. They march upon the fortress as we speak.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... Oh dear?

lines.speaker: Ghost
lines.text: Is everything all right my friend? You don't seem to be yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think I'm who you believe I am.

lines.speaker: Ghost
lines.text: Hmm. You're clearly confused. The lack of sleep is getting to you. Go and have a lie down and we will discuss this later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright...

lines.speaker: Ghost
lines.text: I've been doing some research into our new foes. Rumour has it they once lived in a great city in the far north. The city fell and now they are homeless.

lines.speaker: Ghost
lines.text: It seems they have been promised a new home here in return for wiping us out. We must take great care. We may be fighting for our home, but it seems they are as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... And err, how's the fight going so far?

lines.speaker: Ghost
lines.text: You tell me, I'm no warrior. That said, I did hear that they'd managed to turn some of our own golems against us. If they can do that, I fear what else they may do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh my... That doesn't sound good...

lines.speaker: Ghost
lines.text: Indeed. We have increased our offerings tenfold, but I fear they fall on empty ears. Perhaps our lord really has gone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm. Well I hope it all works out.
